mapper.sql: select r.*, a.application_no, a.service_type, a.status, a.user_id, o.order_no, o.product_name, u.display_name as user_display_name from after_sale_risk_assessment r left join after_sale_application a on r.application_id=a.id left join demo_order o on a.order_id=o.id left join user_account u on a.user_id=u.id
mapper.select: order by r.risk_score desc, r.updated_at desc, r.id desc
mapper.update: update after_sale_risk_assessment set risk_level=#{riskLevel}, risk_score=#{riskScore}, risk_tags=#{riskTags}, risk_reasons=#{riskReasons}, suggested_action=#{suggestedAction}, rule_detail_json=#{ruleDetailJson}, ai_summary=#{aiSummary}, ai_status=#{aiStatus}, ai_error_message=#{aiErrorMessage} where id=#{id}
